messages: {"parts":[{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{\"cmd\": \"python3 << 'EOF'\\nimport ast\\nimport re\\n\\n# Read the file\\nwith open('/home/.z/workspaces/con_Qb3mvDzPRk76ld67/app_responses/google_drive~~3ause_app_google_drive_core.txt', 'r') as f:\\n    content = f.read()\\n\\n# Extract the ret= array using regex\\nmatch = re.search(r'ret=(\\\\[.*?\\\\])\\\\s+stash_id', content, re.DOTALL)\\nif match:\\n    list_str = match.group(1)\\n    files = ast.literal_eval(list_str)\\n    \\n    print(f\\\"Total files found: {len(files)}\\\\n\\\")\\n    \\n    for file in files:\\n        name = file.get('name', 'Unknown')\\n        file_id = file.get('id', 'Unknown')\\n        mime_type = file.get('mimeType', 'Unknown')\\n        print(f\\\"- {name} (ID: {file_id}, Type: {mime_type})\\\")\\nelse:\\n    print(\\\"Could not parse the response\\\")\\nEOF\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01LbU32d58YBibhczCmMLvTo","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":62556,"cache_write_tokens":605,"cache_read_tokens":61951,"output_tokens":328,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":605,"cache_read_input_tokens":61951,"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":328}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:03:17.096431Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Operator"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01Y78C7mEEmKqHr13FirH3ww","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"dd98a1bb-f49e-4c2a-bb3f-4541c8715ed3","metadata":null}
